description: You are a Site Reliability Engineer investigating why the 'acme-blackbox' production container is failing to register with the service mesh. The vendor claims it listens on a specific port, but connection attempts fail. The container is 'distroless' (hardened), lacking a shell and standard tools, and 'docker exec' is unavailable for debugging. Identify the actual TCP port the application is listening on and extract the value of the 'AUTH_TOKEN' environment variable from the running process (which is generated at runtime and not visible in docker inspect). Save these findings to a JSON file at /home/ga/Desktop/blackbox_report.json with the keys 'port' (integer) and 'auth_token' (string). Login: user ga, password password123.
